jiuwen.core.foundation — Tool System

Contents

  • ToolCard
    • ToolCard
      • ToolCard.tool_info()
  • ToolComponent
    • ToolComponent

jiuwen.core.foundation — Tool System#

ToolCard#

class jiuwen.core.foundation.ToolCard#

Metadata card for tools. Inherits from BaseCard.

parameters: dict | None (default None)

JSON Schema for tool parameters.

func: Callable | None (default None)

The callable function. Excluded from serialization.

tool_info() → dict#

ToolComponent#

class jiuwen.core.foundation.ToolComponent(card: ToolCard)#

Workflow component wrapping a ToolCard.

card: ToolCard
async invoke(inputs: dict, **kwargs) -> dict

Call the tool function with keyword arguments from inputs. Automatically detects sync vs async. Returns {"output": result}.
